name: 说服三要素
subject: english
curriculum_points: Students evaluate, synthesize, and cite research to support their arguments.
Students develop the skills of rhetorical analysis and composition as they repeatedly practice analyzing others’ arguments, then compose their own arguments.
Writers defend their claims with evidence and/or reasoning.
Types of evidence may include facts, anecdotes, analogies, statistics, examples, details, illustrations, expert opinions, personal observations, personal experiences, testimonies, or experiments.
